scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @sbud-d/types build && pnpm --filter @sbud-d/shared build && tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @sbud-d/types build && pnpm --filter @sbud-d/shared build && tsc --project tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @sbud-d/types build && pnpm --filter @sbud-d/shared build && tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json
